creator: hsn@sendmail.cz
text:
distcc-gtk is missing icon


===> The following configuration options are available for distcc-gtk-3.1_4:
     AVAHI=off: Avahi Zeroconf/mDNS/Bonjour support
     COMPILER_LINKS=off
     GNOME=off: GUI monitor based on GNOME
     GTK=on: Build GUI monitor based on GTK
     IPV6=on: IPv6 protocol support

$ distccmon-gnome 

(distccmon-gnome:64145): Gtk-WARNING **: Error loading icon from file '/usr/local/share/distcc/distccmon-gnome-icon.png':
	Failed to open file '/usr/local/share/distcc/distccmon-gnome-icon.png': No such file or directory
